28 Feb

Young Sports Achiever Awards

Young sports stars will be recognised weekly during school terms with awards from clubs and coaches.

We’re inviting Under-12 sporting clubs in the City of Wyndham to take part in our Young Sports Achievers Awards Program, celebrating junior athletes and the clubs that support them.

The program recognises outstanding effort, sportsmanship, and dedication throughout the season, giving clubs the opportunity to spotlight their young players in a positive and community-focused way.

Club coaches or administrators are invited to submit an Expression of Interest to have their team considered for participation.*

Please note:

  • Spots are limited and successful clubs will be contacted directly

  • If your club has multiple sports (e.g. Football and Cricket), please submit a separate Expression of Interest for each team

Ready to get involved?

Submit your club’s Expression of Interest using the form below.

 

 Terms and Conditions apply

We will be in contact with the club via the details below. We ask that the person nominating and sharing contacts is the coach or administrator.

I agree to the privacy policy and wish to receive Pacific Werribee's newsletter containing the latest news and offers.

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Bunurong people of the Kulin Nation, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Pacific Werribee resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise First Nations peoples’ longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
